title: PackUK senior team update
body: "On behalf of the four nations of the UK, we are delighted to announce the appointment of the permanent Chief Executive and Chief Strategy Officers for PackUK, the scheme administrator for packaging Extended Producer Responsibility. These are important roles leading the operationalisation of this cornerstone reform and will play a pivotal role in the leadership of PackUK, ensuring it operates fairly, delivers value for money and achieves our shared environmental and economic goals. Working across the UK, they will lead the implementation and continuous improvement of the scheme, including forming an important relationship with planned Producer Responsibility Organisation and with local government as we work together to deliver efficient and effective packaging collection and recycling services.  Building on the important and valuable industry experience brought by Margaret Bates (the interim Head of PackUK), we have explicitly sought to recruit candidates who have extensive experience working in and with the packaging value chain. We are pleased both appointees bring a wealth of such experience, delivering on our commitment to bring producers into the leadership of the scheme wherever possible. Both were appointed following an open, external recruitment campaign.  Chief Executive Officer – Jeremy Blake  Jeremy has a diverse background, starting in forensic science. His interest in solving problems using science led him to move into the recycling industry, specialising in polymers but with periods in glass, metal and paper. Having spent several years leading the plastic and paper recycling operations of the largest recycler in the UK, at the time, he moved to become the Chief Operating Officer of advanced recycling company, Enval. He then joined one of the largest global plastic packaging converters, Berry Global (now Amcor), where he was the Managing Director of their rigid plastic recycling business.  This role included responsibility for the build and operation of their latest recycling site that provides a circular route for kerbside collected polypropylene back into high-quality packaging. Most recently, he has served as the Director of Circular Economy for Amcor and drives the effective management of their products throughout their lifecycle throughout the globe.  This combines the knowledge he has gained in nearly all parts of the packaging circular economy and his passion for positive environmental change. Jeremy also acts in an advisory capacity to many groups to drive the development of the Circular Economy.   Reflecting on Jeremy (Jez)’s appointment, Margaret comments, “I am delighted that Jez Blake will be the permanent CEO of PackUK, I have known and admired Jez for some time. He brings a commitment to the Circular Economy, together with great sector knowledge and leadership. It is great that I can pass the excellent team at PackUK to someone I know and trust.”  Chief Strategy Officer – Esther Carter  Esther is a sustainability leader with deep expertise in driving systems change across the packaging, recycling, and consumer goods sectors. She has collaborated with many of the brands and businesses at the heart of EPR reform - such as P&G, Mars, Amcor and Dow - to deliver practical solutions that make circularity a...
